name: Subnautica
description: An action RPG set in the late 22nd century. The ship you were travelling aboard was struck by an unknown energy weapon and has crash landed in the ocean of an alien planet. You, my friend, are the sole survivor. Gather materials, explore the unknown, figure out what happened and most importantly, escape. (This is my first ever bot, it will probably be awful. If people like it, i might try and make it better and add the PDA)
creator: Hachi-Roku
